name: Tenpai Dragon Genroku
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>幻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>禄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ろく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>盃</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぱい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If this card is added to your hand, except by drawing it: You can Special Summon this card as a Tuner, then you can increase its Level by 1. (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 "Tenpai Dragon" monster from your Deck, except "Tenpai Dragon Genroku", also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except Dragon monsters. You can only use each effect of "Tenpai Dragon Genroku" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is added to your hand, except by drawing it: You can Special Summon this card as a Tuner, then you can increase its Level by 1. (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 "Tenpai Dragon" monster from your Deck, except "Tenpai Dragon Genroku", also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except Dragon monsters. You can only use each effect of "Tenpai Dragon Genroku" once per turn.
eff: If this card is added to your hand, except by drawing it: You can Special Summon this card as a Tuner, then you can increase its Level by 1. (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 "Tenpai Dragon" monster from your Deck, except "Tenpai Dragon Genroku", also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except Dragon monsters. You can only use each effect of "Tenpai Dragon Genroku" once per turn.

action: Activates if added to the hand
stat_change: Treats itself as a Tuner monster
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
